title: Add table widget to Item cards
excerpt:
Hi,

posts.author: Filurisen (Therese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We´d like to be able to add a table widget to Item cards in order to structure up the data within our companies annual plans per team. That could i.e. be relevant for reporting KPI:s across years. Is that possible or would it be something relevant for future releases?

Kind regards,
Therese

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Filurisen,

We hear where you’re coming from here! At the moment, this isn’t currently possible, however we will go ahead and convert this into a feature request so other community members can vote on the request, and get this on our roadmap

You can read more about our feature request process here: All you need to know about our feature request process!

posts.author: Filurisen (Therese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BiancaT,

Great thank you!

Kind regards,
Therese
